mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in housing units starts signals an uptick in demand for residential construction materials, which in turn boosts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if 5-day forward returns in periods with rising housing starts are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production signals a supply-side shock that compresses profit margins and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if 20-day forward returns in periods with declining industrial production are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that raises discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if 60-day forward returns in periods with rising federal funds rates are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in initial unemployment claims signals a weakening labor market that leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if 20-day forward returns in periods with rising initial unemployment claims are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP signals an uptick in aggregate demand that boosts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if 5-day forward returns in periods with rising real GDP are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in industrial production and a 1-month increase in housing units starts signals a supply-side shock that compresses profit margins and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if 20-day forward returns in periods with declining industrial production and rising housing starts are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in the federal funds rate and a 2-month decline in real GDP signals a tightening monetary cycle that raises discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if 60-day forward returns in periods with rising federal funds rates and declining real GDP are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in initial unemployment claims and a 1-month decline in payroll employment signals a weakening labor market that leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if 20-day forward returns in periods with rising initial unemployment claims and declining payroll employment are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).
